headline: Today's top AI story: Now, defenders are embracing the prompt injection, too
bullets: Now, defenders are embracing the prompt injection, too
German AI consortium releases Soofi S, an open 30B model that tops benchmarks in both English and German
Rust-proof your code with our new Testing Handbook chapter
Doc: DHS analysts twice dismissed signs of intruders inside the DHS' network, first detected in May, as harmless activity before confirming a breach in June (David DiMolfetta/Nextgov/FCW)
